center.name: 女王花園群島
center.summary: 女王花園群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cuban pewee，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nerlyi: Jardines de la Reina and nearby islands off the southern coast of mainland Cuba The Cuban pewee inhabits the interior and edges of broadleaf and pine forest, brushy scrublands, swampy areas, and tree plantations in the tropical and upper tropical zones
